background: Suppose that a die is rolled 120 times and the number of times each face comes up is recorded. The following results are obtained: Face: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6; Observed frequencies: 15, 21, 20, 15, 26, 23. Test whether the die is fair at the 5% level of significance using the Chi-square test.

task.query: Test whether the die is fair at the 5% level of significance using the Chi-square test.
task.answer: We cannot reject the null hypothesis.
